parameters.name: query
parameters.value:
CREATE CONSTRAINT event_id_unique IF NOT EXISTS
FOR (e:Event) REQUIRE e.event_id IS UNIQUE;

parameters.name: query
parameters.value:
CREATE CONSTRAINT host_hostname_unique IF NOT EXISTS
FOR (h:Host) REQUIRE h.hostname IS UNIQUE;

parameters.name: query
parameters.value:
CREATE CONSTRAINT user_id_unique IF NOT EXISTS
FOR (u:User) REQUIRE u.user_id IS UNIQUE;

parameters.name: query
parameters.value:
CREATE CONSTRAINT ip_unique IF NOT EXISTS
FOR (ip:IPAddress) REQUIRE ip.ip IS UNIQUE;

parameters.name: query
parameters.value:
CREATE CONSTRAINT domain_unique IF NOT EXISTS
FOR (d:Domain) REQUIRE d.domain IS UNIQUE;

parameters.name: query
parameters.value:
CREATE CONSTRAINT url_unique IF NOT EXISTS
FOR (u:URL) REQUIRE u.url IS UNIQUE;

parameters.name: query
parameters.value:
CREATE CONSTRAINT file_hash_unique IF NOT EXISTS
FOR (f:FileHash) REQUIRE f.hash IS UNIQUE;

parameters.name: query
parameters.value:
CREATE CONSTRAINT technique_id_unique IF NOT EXISTS
FOR (t:Technique) REQUIRE t.technique_id IS UNIQUE;

parameters.name: query
parameters.value:
CREATE CONSTRAINT intel_id_unique IF NOT EXISTS
FOR (ti:ThreatIntel) REQUIRE ti.intel_id IS UNIQUE;

parameters.name: query
parameters.value:
CREATE CONSTRAINT actor_name_unique IF NOT EXISTS
FOR (a:ThreatActor) REQUIRE a.name IS UNIQUE;

parameters.name: query
parameters.value:
CREATE CONSTRAINT malware_name_unique IF NOT EXISTS
FOR (m:Malware) REQUIRE m.name IS UNIQUE;

parameters.name: query
parameters.value:
CREATE CONSTRAINT campaign_name_unique IF NOT EXISTS
FOR (c:Campaign) REQUIRE c.name IS UNIQUE;

parameters.content:
## Setup Constraints
필수는 아니지만
스키마에 맞게 깔끔하게 적재하기 위한 "안전장치"

parameters.name: query
parameters.value:
=MERGE (e:Event {event_id: '{{ $json.event_id }}'})
SET e.timestamp = '{{ $json.timestamp }}',
    e.alert_type = '{{ $json.alert_type }}',
    e.severity = '{{ $json.severity }}'

MERGE (h:Host {hostname: '{{ $json.hostname }}'})
MERGE (u:User {user_id: '{{ $json.user_id }}'})
MERGE (src:IPAddress {ip: '{{ $json.src_ip }}'})
MERGE (dst:IPAddress {ip: '{{ $json.dst_ip }}'})
MERGE (d:Domain {domain: '{{ $json.domain }}'})
MERGE (url:URL {url: '{{ $json.url }}'})
MERGE (fh:FileHash {hash: '{{ $json.file_hash }}'})
MERGE (t:Technique {technique_id: '{{ $json.technique_id }}'})

MERGE (e)-[:OCCURRED_ON]->(h)
MERGE (e)-[:INITIATED_BY]->(u)
MERGE (e)-[:FROM_IP]->(src)
MERGE (e)-[:TO_IP]->(dst)
MERGE (e)-[:CONTACTED_DOMAIN]->(d)
MERGE (e)-[:REQUESTED_URL]->(url)
MERGE (e)-[:INVOLVED_FILE]->(fh)
MERGE (e)-[:USES_TECHNIQUE]->(t)

parameters.name: query
parameters.value:
=MERGE (ti:ThreatIntel {intel_id: '{{ $json.intel_id }}'})
SET ti.source = '{{ $json.source }}',
    ti.confidence = {{ $json.confidence }},
    ti.first_seen = '{{ $json.first_seen }}',
    ti.last_seen = '{{ $json.last_seen }}'

MERGE (ioc:Domain {domain: '{{ $json.indicator_value }}'})
MERGE (ti)-[:DESCRIBES]->(ioc)

MERGE (a:ThreatActor {name: '{{ $json.threat_actor }}'})
SET a.origin = '{{ $json.actor_origin }}',
    a.motivation = '{{ $json.actor_motivation }}'

MERGE (m:Malware {name: '{{ $json.malware }}'})
SET m.malware_type = '{{ $json.malware_type }}'

MERGE (c:Campaign {name: '{{ $json.campaign }}'})
SET c.description = '{{ $json.campaign_description }}'

MERGE (ti)-[:ATTRIBUTED_TO]->(a)
MERGE (ti)-[:ASSOCIATED_WITH_MALWARE]->(m)
MERGE (ti)-[:PART_OF_CAMPAIGN]->(c)

MERGE (a)-[:USES_MALWARE]->(m)
MERGE (a)-[:OPERATES_CAMPAIGN]->(c)

parameters.value:
=MERGE (ti:ThreatIntel {intel_id: '{{ $json.intel_id }}'})
SET ti.source = '{{ $json.source }}',
    ti.confidence = {{ $json.confidence }},
    ti.first_seen = '{{ $json.first_seen }}',
    ti.last_seen = '{{ $json.last_seen }}'

MERGE (ioc:URL {url: '{{ $json.indicator_value }}'})
MERGE (ti)-[:DESCRIBES]->(ioc)

MERGE (a:ThreatActor {name: '{{ $json.threat_actor }}'})
SET a.origin = '{{ $json.actor_origin }}',
    a.motivation = '{{ $json.actor_motivation }}'

MERGE (m:Malware {name: '{{ $json.malware }}'})
SET m.malware_type = '{{ $json.malware_type }}'

MERGE (c:Campaign {name: '{{ $json.campaign }}'})
SET c.description = '{{ $json.campaign_description }}'

MERGE (ti)-[:ATTRIBUTED_TO]->(a)
MERGE (ti)-[:ASSOCIATED_WITH_MALWARE]->(m)
MERGE (ti)-[:PART_OF_CAMPAIGN]->(c)

MERGE (a)-[:USES_MALWARE]->(m)
MERGE (a)-[:OPERATES_CAMPAIGN]->(c)

parameters.value:
=MERGE (ti:ThreatIntel {intel_id: '{{ $json.intel_id }}'})
SET ti.source = '{{ $json.source }}',
    ti.confidence = {{ $json.confidence }},
    ti.first_seen = '{{ $json.first_seen }}',
    ti.last_seen = '{{ $json.last_seen }}'

MERGE (ioc:IPAddress {ip: '{{ $json.indicator_value }}'})

MERGE (a:ThreatActor {name: '{{ $json.threat_actor }}'})
SET a.origin = '{{ $json.actor_origin }}',
    a.motivation = '{{ $json.actor_motivation }}'

MERGE (m:Malware {name: '{{ $json.malware }}'})
SET m.malware_type = '{{ $json.malware_type }}'

MERGE (c:Campaign {name: '{{ $json.campaign }}'})
SET c.description = '{{ $json.campaign_description }}'

MERGE (ti)-[:ATTRIBUTED_TO]->(a)
MERGE (ti)-[:ASSOCIATED_WITH_MALWARE]->(m)
MERGE (ti)-[:PART_OF_CAMPAIGN]->(c)

MERGE (a)-[:USES_MALWARE]->(m)
MERGE (a)-[:OPERATES_CAMPAIGN]->(c)

parameters.name: query
parameters.value:
=MERGE (ti:ThreatIntel {intel_id: '{{ $json.intel_id }}'})
SET ti.source = '{{ $json.source }}',
    ti.confidence = {{ $json.confidence }},
    ti.first_seen = '{{ $json.first_seen }}',
    ti.last_seen = '{{ $json.last_seen }}'

MERGE (ioc:FileHash {hash: '{{ $json.indicator_value }}'})
MERGE (ti)-[:DESCRIBES]->(ioc)

MERGE (a:ThreatActor {name: '{{ $json.threat_actor }}'})
SET a.origin = '{{ $json.actor_origin }}',
    a.motivation = '{{ $json.actor_motivation }}'

MERGE (m:Malware {name: '{{ $json.malware }}'})
SET m.malware_type = '{{ $json.malware_type }}'

MERGE (c:Campaign {name: '{{ $json.campaign }}'})
SET c.description = '{{ $json.campaign_description }}'

MERGE (ti)-[:ATTRIBUTED_TO]->(a)
MERGE (ti)-[:ASSOCIATED_WITH_MALWARE]->(m)
MERGE (ti)-[:PART_OF_CAMPAIGN]->(c)

MERGE (a)-[:USES_MALWARE]->(m)
MERGE (a)-[:OPERATES_CAMPAIGN]->(c)

parameters.name: query
parameters.value:
=MERGE (ti:ThreatIntel {intel_id: '{{ $json.intel_id }}'})

MERGE (t:Technique {technique_id: '{{ $json.technique_id }}'})
SET t.name = '{{ $json.technique_name }}',
    t.tactic = '{{ $json.tactic }}'

MERGE (ti)-[:REPORTS_TECHNIQUE]->(t)

WITH ti, t
MATCH (m:Malware {name: '{{ $json.malware }}'})
MERGE (m)-[:USES_TECHNIQUE]->(t)

parameters.content:
## Integrate CSV data

- CSV 파일을 읽어들여 파싱 및 정규화를 거친 후 Neo4j 에 통합하는 과정

Nodes Created
• Event (event_id, timestamp, alert_type, severity)
• Host (hostname)
• User (user_id)
• IPAddress (src_ip / dst_ip)
• Domain (domain)
• URL (url)
• FileHash (hash)
• Technique (technique_id)

Relationships Created
• Event -[:OCCURRED_ON]-> Host
• Event -[:INITIATED_BY]-> User
• Event -[:FROM_IP]-> Source IP
• Event -[:TO_IP]-> Destination IP
• Event -[:CONTACTED_DOMAIN]-> Domain
• Event -[:REQUESTED_URL]-> URL
• Event -[:INVOLVED_FILE]-> FileHash
• Event -[:USES_TECHNIQUE]-> Technique

## Integrate JSON data

- CTI JSON 피드를 구조화된 threat graph로 통합
- 외부 인텔리전스 정보를 내부 보안 이벤트(앞 플로우)와 통합하는 것이 목적

Nodes Created
• ThreatIntel (intel_id, source, confidence, first_seen, last_seen)
• Domain / URL / IPAddress / FileHash (IOC by indicator_type)
• ThreatActor (name, origin, motivation)
• Malware (name, malware_type)
• Campaign (name, description)
• Technique (technique_id, name, tactic)

Relationships Created
• ThreatIntel -[:DESCRIBES]-> IOC
• ThreatIntel -[:ATTRIBUTED_TO]-> ThreatActor
• ThreatIntel -[:ASSOCIATED_WITH_MALWARE]-> Malware
• ThreatIntel -[:PART_OF_CAMPAIGN]-> Campaign
• ThreatIntel -[:REPORTS_TECHNIQUE]-> Technique
• ThreatActor -[:USES_MALWARE]-> Malware
• ThreatActor -[:OPERATES_CAMPAIGN]-> Campaign
• Malware -[:USES_TECHNIQUE]-> Technique
